title: Severe Storms Expected in Charlotte Area
summary: Charlotte faces severe storms with potential for damaging winds and tornadoes starting Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Residents need to prepare for potential disruptions and safety risks due to severe weather conditions.

title: Fatal Shooting in Hickory: Suspect Charged
summary: A shooting in Hickory leaves one dead and two injured; a suspect is charged with murder.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on local communities.

title: Fatal House Fire Under Investigation in Chesterfield County
summary: A house fire in Chesterfield County results in one death, prompting an arson investigation.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about fire safety and potential criminal activity in the area.

title: Woman Charged with Kidnapping in Lincoln County
summary: A woman is charged with kidnapping a child in Lincoln County after leaving with her own children and the victim.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of child safety and the legal consequences of abduction.

title: Sycamore Brewing Reopening with New Name and Owner
summary: Sycamore Brewing is reopening this weekend as Club West Brewing with a new owner taking over.
charlotte_impact: Signals a positive change for a local business and potential economic benefits for the community.

title: Stabbing in East Charlotte
summary: One person was stabbed in east Charlotte and taken to the hospital with serious injuries.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about public safety and violent crime in the city.

title: Missing Anson County Teen Found Safe
summary: A 19-year-old missing from Anson County since March 10 has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: Provides relief and highlights the effectiveness of search and rescue efforts.

title: Charlotte Airport Operational Despite Shutdown
summary: Charlotte Douglas Airport maintains operations with TSA staffing despite the government shutdown.
charlotte_impact: Ensures continued travel and commerce despite national political issues.

title: Fatal Hit-and-Run on The Plaza: Police Seek Driver
summary: A hit-and-run in Charlotte kills a 23-year-old woman; police are searching for the fleeing driver.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for responsible driving and the consequences of reckless behavior.

title: Pedestrian Critically Injured in South Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian is hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after being struck by a vehicle in south Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights pedestrian safety concerns and the potential for serious accidents.

title: Shooting Near Loyalty Inn: Residents Demand Closure
summary: Two are shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, marking the fifth violent incident this year; residents want the hotel closed.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community concerns about safety and the impact of crime hotspots.

title: NC Fire Leaders Warn of Growing Wildfire Threat
summary: Fire leaders warn that North Carolina faces a growing wildfire threat due to rising fire numbers and hurricane damage.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about environmental risks and the need for fire prevention measures.

title: Sustain Charlotte Challenges I-77 South Alternatives
summary: Sustain Charlotte launches a public challenge for alternatives to the I-77 South project.
charlotte_impact: Encourages community involvement in infrastructure planning and environmental protection.

title: New Traffic Signal Planned Near Fort Mill School
summary: A new traffic signal is planned near Catawba Ridge High School to address safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Improves safety for students and drivers in a high-traffic area.

title: Fatal Head-On Collision in Lancaster
summary: Two drivers were killed in a head-on crash in Lancaster on Airport Road.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of driving and the importance of road safety measures.
